title: 重ならないニュアンス

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ahahaha! No waaay! I'm DEAD!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That explosive voice... Turning my head towards the sound, I see
Tosen Jordan and her friend staring at their phones and laughing
wildly.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan's Friend
text_block_list.text: Check this out, Jordan! This one's sooo good!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Omigosh, you're right! I can't! Ahaha, my sides!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not sure what's going on, but it looks like she's enjoying... something?
I'll have to ask her about it later.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I told you, it's California Fuji Izumi.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You know, the comedian? The one doing all those stupid gags going
viral on UmaTok?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
"Gotcha! That there's the last straw!" Come on, you've heard that line,
right?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Seriously? Then... What about this... Pfft, hehe...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: "Popping, ping popping!" Ahhh! I can't! It's too good! Bahaha!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh, come on! If you don't laugh too, that's, like, peak cringe!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
But seriously, you didn't know that one either? Do you, like, never go
on social media or something?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ohhh? Well, I guess this comedian did just start trending recently. How about non-comedy stuff, then?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Stuff like... this, maybe? ♪

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Or maybe this? Isn't this the cutest?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Uhhh, no? Or, like, not exactly? Wow... You really don't know any of
these, huh?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
If you don't know these UmaToks, what are you even watching? What
do you do for fun?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thinking about it, I realize my schedule has been so busy that I no
longer keep up with entertainment much...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I don't watch much TV, but... I should recognize the big names.
What shows do you like?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I try to come up with a few names, but realize I haven't watched
anything lately. Instead, I try mentioning the show I watched as a kid,
Comedy Derby.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Never heard of it... Must be old. Is it uploaded to UmaTube at all?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: You know... I feel like I'm talking to my parents. Big yikes.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Anyway, this meeting's over, right? Then I'm leaving. See ya.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The world I see is so different from hers... At this rate, we might not
even be able to communicate properly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I need to learn more about what she's into. I quickly pull out my
phone and follow the comedian she mentioned and other viral
UmaTokkers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After days and days of studying this strange new world...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hm? What's up? And... why's your face so sus right now? S-seriously,
what's going on?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've carefully observed the media she consumes, absorbing it all. And
now, it's time to show the fruits of my labor...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Uh... Guess I'll snap a pic.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
But, wow, talk about a throwback. I haven't watched that comedian's
act in aaages.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
California Fuji Izumi is soooo last week. Now Michael L. Mica is what's
lit. You know him?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Really? Anyway, what's gotten into you? Your reaction to those
videos was mid at best when I showed them to you before.
choice_data_list: I just wanted to make you laugh...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: So wait. You studied all that... for me? Huh...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I mean, you totally bombed, but try again. I'm uploading this next one
to UmaTok, so you better do it right.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems I'll need to work a little harder to close the gap between
myself and Tosen Jordan.
